description_long: This is a robust, stone water point with a rectangular base and a steeply pitched, overhanging roof. The structure features a prominent sculpted face spout on two opposing sides, from which water flows into a shallow, semi-circular stone basin at the base. The stonework is weathered, with visible moss and water stains, indicating long-term outdoor exposure. One side displays a large, dark metal plaque with engraved text, while another side has a smaller, less legible plaque. The water point is set on a paved platform with cobblestone detailing and a recessed area to collect runoff water. The overall design is classical and utilitarian, suitable for public urban spaces such as parks or plazas.
description: A large, stone water point with a pitched roof, sculpted face spouts, and semi-circular basins, set on a cobblestone platform with visible plaques and weathering.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sculpted face spout with water stains and a semi-circular basin below, framed by rectangular stonework.
description_view_1: This side features a large, dark metal plaque with engraved text and a recessed stone basin, but no spout.
description_view_2: Opposite side to the front, showing another sculpted face spout and basin, mirroring the front but with slightly different weathering.
description_view_3: This view displays a smaller, less legible plaque and a recessed basin, with darker stone coloration and no spout.
attribute_spout_type: sculpted face spout with open mouth, projecting slightly from the stone surface, oriented horizontally
attribute_mounting_location: floor-standing, embedded in ground on a raised stone platform
attribute_signage_or_labeling: large metal plaque with engraved text on one side, smaller plaque on another side
attribute_surrounding_infrastructure: cobblestone platform with recessed semi-circular basins for water collection
